arrival.text:
Upon your arrival, scan your SpotHero parking pass and the gate will open. If you have a covered parking reservation, PLEASE LET ATTENDANT KNOW, AS YOU WILL NEED TO RETRIEVE AN AUTHORIZATION SLIP.

Please arrive at Sky Harbor Airport Parking 15 minutes prior to the time you want to be at your airport terminal.
Proceed to the front and board the green and white 'Sky Harbor Airport Parking' shuttle to PHX airport.

departure.text: Upon your return, grab your belongings and head to the shuttle pickup area. Board the green and white "Sky Harbor Airport Parking' shuttle back to the lot.
Once you are ready to leave, drive to the booth exit lane and show your SpotHero parking pass to the attendant. They will close out your transaction and open the gate for you.

common.title: Sky Harbor Airport Parking - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 402 S 40th St. This is the Sky Harbor Airport Parking garage. It is located on the west side of S 40th St between E Madison St and Air Ln.
restrictions: Height restriction: 9' 9"
If you park outside of your reservation times, you may be charged additional fees at the exit.

Sky Harbor Airport Parking is an Off-Airport parking facility. A trusted and reliable operator with 24hr surveillance and service. Sky Harbor Airport Parking is open 24 hours a day. A quick 4-minute ride to the airport. They provide a free shuttle service to and from Phoenix Airport, all you need to do is check in upon arrival 15 minutes before you need to be at PHX International Airport.
This is NOT on-airport parking. Sky Harbor Airport Parking is an off-airport facility near the airport.

arrival.text: When you arrive to the facility, display your prepaid pass to the attendant either printed out or on a mobile device. The attendant will give you a ticket.
You may park in any space not marked as 'reserved'.

Proceed to the front of the building with your luggage. Request your shuttle by pressing a button on the wall. A  green and white 'Sky Harbor Airport Parking' shuttle will pick you up within 10 min of the call and take you to the airport.

departure.text: Once you arrive back to the airport, grab your belongings and proceed to the shuttle pick up area.  Look for the green and white 'Sky Harbor Airport Parking' shuttle, which runs every 15 minutes.

Upon exit, present the ticket and the cashier will apply the amount prepaid. Note: If you have overstayed your reservation time you may be charged additional fees at exit. Any additional days will be charged at the reservation rate.

common.title: Sundance Airport Parking - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 402 S 40th St. This is the Sky Harbor Airport Parking lot which operates Sundance Airport Parking. It is located on the west side of S 40th St between E Madison St and Air Ln.
restrictions:
Attention: During very busy holiday periods and/or other times throughout the year, Sundance Airport
Parking may fill all available spaces. In the event, you arrive for your parking check-in, and the
lot is closed without a lot attendant present, please proceed with your original reservation to the
nearby parking facility, Sky Harbor Airport Parking, located at 402 S. 40th Street, Phoenix AZ
85034. A quick 2 minutes south on 40th Street, just past Washington, directly past the railroad
tracks, on the right-hand side. 602-273-7007. Clear signage should also be available onsite with
instructions should this occur. Sky Harbor Airport Parking and Sundance Airport Parking are
business partners and your reservation will be honored (uncovered parking only) at the original
rate at Sky Harbor Airport Parking if and only if Sundance Airport Parking is closed and
unattended.
If you park outside of your reservation times, you may be charged additional fees at the exit.

You will be directed where to park.
The Parking Spot shuttle will pick you up directly at your vehicle to take you to the airport.

departure.text: Upon return, please claim your luggage and follow the pick up instructions on the Locator Slip provided by your shuttle driver.
The shuttle will bring you to your car. From there, follow the signs to the exit.

common.title: The Parking Spot 1 - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3750 East Washington St. This is The Parking Spot 1 garage. It is located on the right-hand side of Washington St. between Gateway Dr. and S 37th St. The entrance is marked with a black and yellow 'The Parking Spot 1' sign marked with white and yellow lettering.
restrictions: The Parking Spot reservations are non-refundable and may not be cancelled.
Complimentary bottled water is available at checkout.
If you park outside your reservation times, you will be charged for each additional day upon exit.
Please have your QR code ready to scan when you arrive. This helps us get you parked and on your way in no time. Thank you!
The Parking Spot reservations may be changed up to 1 hour prior to your scheduled arrival time.

arrival.text: Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader and the gate will open.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Please gather your belongings and proceed to the designated shuttle pick-up area. Shuttles run every 30 minutes starting at the top of the hour.

departure.text: The shuttle departs from the designated shuttle area on the ground floor. Airport pickups are available on demand. Please call (602) 273-7778 for pickup.)
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights. The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: Crowne Plaza Phoenix Airport Parking - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 4300 E Washington St. This is the Crowne Plaza Phoenix Airport Parking garage, operated by LAZ Parking. It is located on the North side of E Washington St. between N 44th St. and N 41st St. You can only access this location by traveling West on E Washington St.
restrictions: Floors: Our parking garage consists of 5 floors, with the 5th floor serving as a rooftop parking area.
Height restriction: 7' 0"
Indoor Parking: Indoor parking may NOT always be guaranteed, particularly during peak times. You may be directed to park on the rooftop.
The shuttle arrival is scheduled; shuttle pick-up is on demand.

common.title: Aloft Phoenix Airport - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: The entrance for this lot  is on Dupont Cir. behind 4450 E Washington St. This is the Aloft Phoenix Airport - Uncovered Self Park lot, operated by Towne Park. From the intersection of S 44th St. and E Washington St., head North on N 44th St. towards East Monroe St. Turn right onto East Monroe St. travel East on East Monroe St. then turn right onto Dupont Cir. Head South on Dupont Cir. until you reach the lot entrance on the right-hand side behind 4450 E Washington St.
restrictions: Please note: Complimentary shuttle is not affiliated with SpotHero. Any issues or concerns with shuttle need to be handled directly with the facility.
Shuttle service runs from 6AM to 10PM.

arrival.text: Upon arrival, pull a ticket at the entrance and retain it for exit purposes.

Proceed to the second floor. To get to the second floor, drive straight up the ramp after entering the facility. Once you are at the top of the ramp, please scan your ticket and enter through the gate.

departure.text:
Shuttle pickup areas at PHX are as follows:
• Terminal 3 – North Side Door 5, Center Median Courtesy Area
• Terminal 4 – North Side Door 7, Ground Level Courtesy Area


PreFlight shuttles are circulating the airport 24/7. You can also call Shuttle Dispatch at (480) 925-9630.
Upon your return to the facility, present your parking pass to the cashier in the West Lobby to receive the receipt that you will need to scan to open the exit gate.

Please call at least 24 hours before your arrival to PreFlight PHX if you require a wheelchair-accessible shuttle, so we can have it prepared for your arrival.


⚠️ Please note: Terminal 3 will be closed to pick-ups and drop-offs from 10 P.M. to 6 A.M., from 2/08 to 4/26. PreFlight buses will only service Terminal 4 during those times. Departing passengers should arrive 15–30 minutes early as they will be dropped off at Terminal 4 and must take the SkyTrain to Terminal 3. Arriving passengers must take the SkyTrain to Terminal 4 to catch the PreFlight bus.

common.title: PreFlight Airport Parking - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 44 N 44th St. This garage is operated by PreFlight Airport Parking. It is located on the NW side of 44th St. The entrance is marked with a red 'PreFlight' sign marked with white lettering.
restrictions: Terminal 3 will be closed to pick-ups and drop-offs from 10 P.M. to 6 A.M., from 2/08 to 4/26. PreFlight buses will only service Terminal 4 during those times. Arriving passengers must take the SkyTrain to Terminal 4 to catch the PreFlight bus.

departure.text:

• Terminal 3 – North Side Door 5, Center Median Courtesy Area

PreFlight shuttles are circulating the airport 24/7. You can also call Shuttle Dispatch at (480) 925-9630.
Upon your return to the facility, present your parking pass to the cashier in the West Lobby to receive the receipt that you will need to scan to open the exit gate.
Please call at least 24 hours before your arrival to PreFlight PHX if you require a wheelchair-accessible shuttle, so we can have it prepared for your arrival.

⚠️ Please note: Terminal 3 will be closed to pick-ups and drop-offs from 10 P.M. to 6 A.M., from 2/08 to 4/26. PreFlight buses will only service Terminal 4 during those times. Departing passengers should arrive 15–30 minutes early as they will be dropped off at Terminal 4 and must take the SkyTrain to Terminal 3. Arriving passengers must take the SkyTrain to Terminal 4 to catch the PreFlight bus.

restrictions: Please Note: This parking option is for Rooftop Parking Only. If you prefer covered parking, please select Preflight's Covered Self Park option.

Terminal 3 will be closed to pick-ups and drop-offs from 10 P.M. to 6 A.M., from 2/08 to 4/26. PreFlight buses will only service Terminal 4 during those times. arrival.text: Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow. Your license plate is your prepaid parking voucher.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".

After securing your belongings you may board the shuttle bound for PHX. Airport Parking Phoenix provides complimentary shuttle services to our lot to and from the the Sky Train Lot (located at 44th and Washington) from 7:00 am to 10:00 pm. Our shuttle driver offers a convenient and efficient way to transfer between the parking lot and the Sky Train Station. For those who need transportation after hours or prefer private transport, rideshare is easy and affordable from the lot to PHX.

departure.text: After securing your luggage, follow the signs for the Sky Train. Take the Sky Train to 44th St & Washington Station.

Call us to arrange a shuttle pick up at 623-273-9243. Shuttle services are available from 7:00 am to 10:00 pm. Board the shuttle back to the lot. For those who need transportation after hours or prefer private transport, rideshare is easy and affordable from PHX to the lot.
Once back at the lot, simply leave when you’re ready to go!

common.title: Airport Parking PHX Lot 1 - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 4728 E Van Buren St. This is the Airport Parking Phoenix Parking Lot 1. It is located on the North side of E Van Buren St. between 48th St. and N 47th Pl.
restrictions: Airport Parking Phoenix provides complimentary shuttle services to and from our lot to and from the Sky Train Lot (located at 44th and Washington) from 7:00 a.m. to 10:00 p.m.
The shuttle tracking link: https://trackmyshuttle.com/9243

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

items.full_description: The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.

arrival.text: When you arrive at the location, show the hotel front desk your parking reservation, receive a validation code, and then register your vehicle via the QR code at the front desk. All vehicles must be properly registered.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Gather your belongings and head to the shuttle pick-up area.

departure.text: Upon arrival back to PHX, gather your belongings and call 602 244 8800 to request a shuttle pick-up back to the hotel.
When you are ready to go, you may simply leave!

common.title: Holiday Inn & Suites Phoenix Airport North - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 1515 N 44th St. This is the Holiday Inn & Suites Lot, operated by PMC. It is located on the East side of N 44th St. between E Willetta St. and McDowell Rd. You can only access this location by traveling North on N 44th St.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.

items.full_description: This amount covers fees charged by the facility operator for costs such as airport charges, facility fees, and additional operator expenses, as estimated by SpotHero.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
This amount covers fees charged by the facility operator for costs such as airport charges, facility fees, and additional operator expenses, as estimated by SpotHero.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: Upon your arrival, show the hotel front desk your parking reservation, either printed or on a mobile device. You'll receive a validation code, then register your vehicle via the QR code at the front desk. All vehicles must be properly registered.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Arrange your rideshare or taxi to the PHX Airport.

departure.text: Upon your return, arrange your rideshare or taxi back to the hotel.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Hilton Garden Inn University Research Park - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: This Lot is located in the alley behind 7290 Price Rd. From the intersection of Price Rd. and Western Canal Path, head South on Price Rd. towards E Elliot Rd. Turn right to enter the alley at 3212 Price Rd. Head West through the alley and then turn right, heading North until you reach the Hilton Garden Inn University Research Park Lot behind  7290 Price Rd.
